creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Flo

njs is not directly a part of nginx but an additional module. For these modules no vuxml entries are created, because they don't have anything to do with the NGINX port. It would also affect -nginx-devel, nginx-full etc in addition to nginx.
I hope, I am today ready to commit the new version of NGINX, there will be then besides modules also the update for NJS.

you could check if the port devel/libnjs needs a vuxml entry.
